name: Nuclei
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Template-based vulnerability scanner from ProjectDiscovery. Runs real scans built from reusable, data-driven Scan Profiles (see profiles/) -- Nuclei's JSONL output is parsed and normalized into observations/evidence, never a fabricated finding.

install_instructions.linux: A Go binary with no apt/dnf/pacman package: `go install github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei/v3/cmd/nuclei@latest` (installs to `~/go/bin`). See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
